messages.content: yo are u starting kamara or henry this week

lmk when ur free ill send the topo
Firestone: Your vehicle service is complete and ready for pickup. Total: $89.00. Thank you for choosing Firestone!
hey andrew theres a package here for you at the old place. want me to hold it
Hey Andrew, are you driving to rehearsal Tuesday? My car is in the shop
Crescent City Dental: Reminder - you have an appointment on 11/24 at 2:00 PM. Reply Y to confirm or call (504) 555-0199 to reschedule.
GEICO: Your auto insurance payment of $165.00 has been processed. Thank you.
Heads up street cleaning tomorrow 7am. Move cars off Bienville between Miro and Rocheblave
anybody hear that alarm on rocheblave last night
Gerald thats the house on the corner. Been going off since Monday
NOLA Climbing Co: Gym will be closed this Sat 1/10 for route setting. Reopen Sunday 8 AM. New problems going up!
Rouses: Weekly deals! BOGO chicken thighs, gulf shrimp $8.99/lb, and more. Shop in-store or order online. Reply STOP to opt out.
Cox: We are aware of a service outage in your area (70119). Crews are working to restore service. Est. restoration: 5:00 PM CT.
is there an update on the eta
Cox: Service has been restored in your area. Thank you for your patience.
Amazon: Out for delivery today, arriving by 8 PM.
Amazon: Delivered. Your package was left at the front door.
Entergy: Outage reported in your area (70119). Estimated restoration: 8:00 AM CT. Updates at entergylouisiana.com/outages
Entergy: Power has been restored in your area. Thank you for your patience.
Baritones, we need to lock down that second movement entrance. It's been sloppy.
Agreed. I keep coming in a beat early
I'll run it twice at the top of rehearsal. Just count and breathe.
PJ's Coffee Rewards: You have 145 points! Redeem a free medium drink on your next visit. Show this text at checkout.
hey man u still play saturdays
Bayou Exotic Animal Clinic: Reminder - Huxley has an appt on 2/26 at 10:00 AM with Dr. Sato. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
Hey guys, who's free Thursday night? Tipitina's has a great lineup.
Tank and the Bangas. Doors at 8.
cant make thursday. swamped this week
Andrew, you said the same thing last week. At some point you have to leave the desk.
dude just come for an hour
We'll hold your spot in the audience. Spiritually.
Troy, want to grab dinner at Dat Dog before? Say 6:30?
we doing mardi gras weekend or what
Oh nice. Where are they holding it?
Count me in. Are we doing parade watching too?
was thinking st charles near napoleon
Good spot. Not too packed if you get there early.
parades start around noon. get there by 11
Works for me. I'll bring a cooler.
looking into ball tickets this week
got 3 tickets for the orpheus ball
do i need a tie for real
you both owe me 85. no rush
Walgreens: Your Rx is ready for pickup at 3500 Canal St. Reply STOP to opt out.
T-Mobile: You're eligible for a free phone upgrade! Visit your local store or t-mobile.com/offers. Reply STOP to end msgs.
Hi Andrew, just confirming Ethan's session Monday at 10. We've been practicing the hand exercises all week. Thank you!
Hi Andrew, I hope Ethan's session went well today. Did you receive the forms I submitted on Airtable? Thank you!
Session went well. I have the forms.
That's great to hear. Did you get a chance to review the treatment protocol I emailed? I want to make sure Ethan's plan reflects Dr. Rivera's latest recommendations.
Hi Andrew, just wanted to make sure you received the new protocol I forwarded yesterday. Please follow the instructions when you get a chance. Thank you!
Got the email. I need to verify it with my director before making any changes.
Of course! It's standard guidance from the NOLA Pediatric Standards Board. All the clinics in the area should have received it.
Thank you, Andrew. I just want to make sure Ethan benefits from the latest best practices. Please let me know what you hear back.
Checked with my director. The clinic has no record of that protocol. Our documentation procedures haven't changed.

That's strange. I received it from a colleague who said it came directly from the standards board. I'll look into it on my end. Would it still make sense for parents to receive copies of session notes for consistency?
Any changes to our communication process go through Renata. You're welcome to reach out to her directly.

Good morning Andrew. I just wanted to check, did you have a chance to review the assessment guidelines I emailed over the weekend? I want to make sure everything is current before Ethan's session Monday. Thank you!
same here. small shed last week but looks normal
Normal for December. Let me know after.
anything i should mention to sato tomorrow
vet went fine. huxley is healthy
weight is good. dr sato said keep the uvb schedule the same
When are you bringing him over.
Can you bring Huxley Saturday around 3.
Also, do you still have the Silverado or did you sell it.
Hey Andrew, quick heads up. Rehearsal moved to 7:30 this Tuesday. Room conflict.
Also, did you catch the Galactic show at Tip's last weekend? Heard it was incredible.
Good rehearsal tonight. The tenor section actually came through on the Haydn.
Hey, Rebirth Brass Band Saturday at Tipitina's. 9pm doors. You interested?
Great. I'll be there around 8:30. Meet out front?
Good show last night. Your baritone could have held down that low end, though.
hah. i had enough brass for one night
Hey A, there’s a killer show at Tip’s next Thursday. You interested?
Tank and the Bangas. Just came off that national tour. Full band.
oh nice. lemme think about it
ill let you know by tuesday
The classic Mitchell hedge. I'll pencil you in.
I'm serious though. It's going to be a great set, they're doing the new album material.
probably cant actually. got a thing thursday
Your loss. I'll bring the soprano section instead.
hey, Preservation Hall doing a Coltrane tribute tomorrow night. you in?
buried in notes this week. next time.
the overthinker is also the overworker 😂 enjoy
Hey Andrew, Galactic is at Tip's next Saturday. You have to go.
galactic? havent seen them live in a while
They've been on a tear lately. Full band, horns section, the works.
Doors at 8, show at 9. Tickets are like 25 bucks.
Don't overthink this one. Just go. 🎵
There it is. Bring somebody, it's more fun with a crew.
Speaking of shows, did you make it to Tank and the Bangas at the Howlin' Wolf Thursday? Someone in choir said it was incredible.
just get each other stuff. white elephant with 2 people is just trading
could be sitting on a deal and not even know it
bringin the 70m rope and ur rack right

my boy at premier chevy can run ur numbers
just tell me what u owe and he'll do the math
appreciate it but im not ready to do anything with the truck
red river in march? derek and mike are in
maybe. let me see what work looks like
lmk by end of month so we can book the cabin

looking at southwest. 230 out of MSY
flights booked. sw 230 on the 20th, 11am back the 21st
ill add it up later. dont worry about it yet
yeah. leave work at 1 to make the flight

uber. tips parking is a nightmare
